messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I'm looking for a moderately priced hotel in the north part of town. Could you recommend something for me?
I recommend Limehouse, a 4-star guesthouse with great reviews located at 78-80 Milton Road. Are you interested in more details?
Great, I'd like to book it for two people. A double room for three nights starting tomorrow.
Your hotel has been booked! Can I help you with anything else?
Can you also recommend British restaurants in the central part of town?
How about Midsummer House Restaurant? It's an expensive British restaurant located at Midsummer Common. Would you like more details?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

restaurant.name: midsummer house restaurant
restaurant.signature: seared scallops with truffle apple and celeriac

restaurants_all.name: restaurant one seven
restaurants_all.address: De Vere University Arms Regent Street City Centre
restaurants_all.introduction: adjoining the de vere university arms restaurant one seven is located at the forefront of regent street, and provides a birds eye view to take in the hustle and bustle of the busy city. Enjoy beautifully created food which is always complemented by a fine selection of wines in a truly relaxing and contemporary atmosphere

restaurants_all.name: the oak bistro
restaurants_all.signature: chargrilled rib eye steak with truffle butter mixed salad and fries

restaurants_all.name: the copper kettle
restaurants_all.introduction: the copper kettle serve a variety of english dishes at their restaurant including full english breakfasts lunches, roast dinners and baked potatoes. a takeaway menu is also provided

restaurants_all.name: fitzbillies restaurant
restaurants_all.introduction: fitzbillies restaurant serves a variety of bistro style lunches, anglo-european a la carte evening meals, as well as teas coffees and cakes throughout the day. catering for private parties is available upon request

restaurants_all.name: cotto
restaurants_all.introduction: cotto is a restaurant cafe and bakery all rolled in to one. The restaurant upstairs is open for dinner from wednesday to saturday consisting of one menu of between three to five dishes tailored to the day the cafe and bakery offer cakes and other delicacies

restaurants_all.name: the cambridge chop house
restaurants_all.signature: lamb barnsley chop potato and garlic bake greens and gravy

restaurants_all.name: midsummer house restaurant
restaurants_all.signature: seared scallops with truffle apple and celeriac

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I'm looking for a cheap hotel in the west part of town. Could you recommend something for me?
I recommend Finches Bed And Breakfast, a 4-star guesthouse with great reviews located at 144 Thornton Road. Are you interested in more details?
Great, I'd like to book it for two people. A double room for two nights starting tomorrow.
Your hotel has been booked! Can I help you with anything else?
Can you also recommend Italian restaurants in the central part of town?
How about Clowns Cafe? It's an expensive Italian restaurant located at 54 King Street City Centre. Would you like more details?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

restaurant.name: clowns cafe
restaurant.introduction: clowns cafe serve a variety of drinks as well as italian dishes such as pasta ciabatta and salads

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I'm trying to locate a moderately priced hotel in the central section. Any suggestions for me?
I'd go with Cityroomz, a hotel that has terrific reviews, located at Sleeperz Hotel, Station Road. Interested in hearing more?
Excellent! I'd like to reserve it for two guests. A double room for four nights, check-in tomorrow.
Done! Your hotel booking is complete. Anything else you need?
Could you also point me to Mexican restaurants in the south section?
Check out Chiquito Restaurant Bar! It's an expensive Mexican restaurant situated at 2g Cambridge Leisure Park Cherry Hinton Road Cherry Hinton. Want to hear more about it?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

restaurant.name: chiquito restaurant bar

restaurants_all.name: de luca cucina and bar
restaurants_all.introduction: de luca cucina bar in the heart of cambridge is a stylish spot to enjoy food, wine, cocktails and coffee all in a vibrant atmosphere. The cocktail bar at the front is perfect for coffee and light meals in the day and cocktails in the evening. An open kitchen provides real excitement with head chef darren kiegher and his team preparing simply delicious italian food using locally sourced ingredients.

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I'm looking for a moderately priced hotel in the north part of town. Could you recommend something for me?
I recommend Avalon, a 4-star guesthouse with great reviews located at 62 Gilbert Road. Are you interested in more details?
Great, I'd like to book it for two people. A double room for four nights starting tomorrow.
Your hotel has been booked! Can I help you with anything else?
Can you also recommend Indian restaurants in the west part of town?
How about Meghna? It's a moderately priced Indian restaurant located at 205 Victoria Road Chesterton. Would you like more details?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

I'm searching for a moderately priced hotel in the north neighborhood. Can you help me find one?
I'd suggest Avalon, a 4-star guesthouse with excellent feedback located at 62 Gilbert Road. Want to hear more?
Perfect! I'd like to make a booking for 2 guests. A double room for two nights, checking in tomorrow.

What about Caffe Uno? It's an expensive Italian dining spot at 32 Bridge Street City Centre. Interested in more information?

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I need an expensive place to stay in the central part of the city. Any ideas?
You should try Gonville Hotel - it's a 3-star hotel with solid reviews, situated at Gonville Place. Would you like to hear more?
That works! I'd like to reserve a double room for 2 people, three nights starting from tomorrow.
Done! Your reservation is confirmed. Is there anything else I can do for you?
I also need Indian dining spots in the central part of town. Any suggestions?
I'd recommend Kohinoor - it's a cheap Indian eatery at 74 Mill Road City Centre. Want to know more about it?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I need a cheap hotel in the east area of the city. Any recommendations?
How about Leverton House? It's a 4-star guesthouse with terrific reviews, found at 732-734 Newmarket Road. Want more info?
Sounds perfect! I need to book it for 2 people. A double room for six nights, starting tomorrow.
Booked! Your reservation is set. Anything else you'd like help with?
Yes, I'd also like Italian restaurant recommendations in the central area of the city.
Consider Pizza Hut City Centre! It's a cheap Italian restaurant at Regent Street City Centre. Interested in learning more?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

I'm trying to locate a cheap hotel in the central section. Any suggestions for me?
I'd go with El Shaddai, a guesthouse that has terrific reviews, located at 41 Warkworth Street. Interested in hearing more?
Excellent! I'd like to reserve it for two guests. A double room for three nights, check-in tomorrow.
Done! Your hotel booking is complete. Anything else you need?
Could you also point me to Italian restaurants in the central section?
Check out Clowns Cafe! It's an expensive Italian restaurant situated at 54 King Street City Centre. Want to hear more about it?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I'm looking for a moderately priced hotel in the north part of town. Could you recommend something for me?
I recommend Avalon, a 4-star guesthouse with great reviews located at 62 Gilbert Road. Are you interested in more details?
Great, I'd like to book it for two people. A double room for five nights starting tomorrow.

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I'm trying to locate an expensive hotel in the south section. Any suggestions for me?
I'd go with The Lensfield Hotel, a 3-star hotel that has terrific reviews, located at 53-57 Lensfield Road. Interested in hearing more?
Excellent! I'd like to reserve it for two guests. A double room for two nights, check-in tomorrow.
Done! Your hotel booking is complete. Anything else you need?
Could you also point me to British restaurants in the central section?
Check out The Copper Kettle! It's a moderately priced British restaurant situated at 4 Kings Parade City Centre. Want to hear more about it?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

restaurant.name: the copper kettle
restaurant.introduction: the copper kettle serve a variety of english dishes at their restaurant including full english breakfasts lunches, roast dinners and baked potatoes. a takeaway menu is also provided

restaurants_all.name: restaurant one seven
restaurants_all.address: De Vere University Arms Regent Street City Centre
restaurants_all.introduction: adjoining the de vere university arms restaurant one seven is located at the forefront of regent street, and provides a birds eye view to take in the hustle and bustle of the busy city. Enjoy beautifully created food which is always complemented by a fine selection of wines in a truly relaxing and contemporary atmosphere

restaurants_all.name: cotto
restaurants_all.introduction: cotto is a restaurant cafe and bakery all rolled in to one. The restaurant upstairs is open for dinner from wednesday to saturday consisting of one menu of between three to five dishes tailored to the day the cafe and bakery offer cakes and other delicacies

I'm trying to locate a moderately priced hotel in the north section. Any suggestions for me?
I'd go with Alpha-milton Guest House, a 3-star guesthouse that has terrific reviews, located at 63 Milton Road. Interested in hearing more?
Excellent! I'd like to reserve it for two guests. A double room for six nights, check-in tomorrow.
Done! Your hotel booking is complete. Anything else you need?
Could you also point me to Indian restaurants in the central section?
Check out Curry King! It's an expensive Indian restaurant situated at 5 Jordans Yard Bridge Street City Centre. Want to hear more about it?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I need a moderately priced place to stay in the north part of the city. Any ideas?
You should try Alpha-milton Guest House - it's a 3-star guesthouse with solid reviews, situated at 63 Milton Road. Would you like to hear more?
That works! I'd like to reserve a double room for 2 people, three nights starting from tomorrow.
Done! Your reservation is confirmed. Is there anything else I can do for you?
I also need British dining spots in the west part of town. Any suggestions?
I'd recommend Saint Johns Chop House - it's a moderately priced British eatery at 21 - 24 Northampton Street. Want to know more about it?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I'm searching for an expensive hotel in the central zone. Can you recommend something?
I'd recommend University Arms Hotel, a 4-star hotel with great ratings at Regent Street. Would you like to know more?
Perfect! I'd like to book a double room for two people, six nights beginning tomorrow.
Your booking is confirmed! Is there anything else I can help you with?
I'd also like Chinese restaurant suggestions in the central zone.
What about Charlie Chan? It's a cheap Chinese place located at Regent Street City Centre. Interested in more details?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I need a moderately priced hotel in the north area. Can you suggest one?
I'd suggest Kirkwood House, which is a 4-star guesthouse with excellent ratings at 172 Chesterton Road. Would you like to know more?
Perfect! I want to reserve it for 2 guests. A double room for four nights beginning tomorrow.
Your reservation is confirmed! Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Could you also suggest British places to eat in the central area?
What about Midsummer House Restaurant? It's an expensive British spot at Midsummer Common. Want to hear more about it?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

restaurant.name: midsummer house restaurant
restaurant.signature: seared scallops with truffle apple and celeriac

restaurants_all.name: restaurant one seven
restaurants_all.address: De Vere University Arms Regent Street City Centre
restaurants_all.introduction: adjoining the de vere university arms restaurant one seven is located at the forefront of regent street, and provides a birds eye view to take in the hustle and bustle of the busy city. Enjoy beautifully created food which is always complemented by a fine selection of wines in a truly relaxing and contemporary atmosphere

restaurants_all.name: the oak bistro
restaurants_all.signature: chargrilled rib eye steak with truffle butter mixed salad and fries

restaurants_all.name: the copper kettle
restaurants_all.introduction: the copper kettle serve a variety of english dishes at their restaurant including full english breakfasts lunches, roast dinners and baked potatoes. a takeaway menu is also provided

restaurants_all.name: fitzbillies restaurant
restaurants_all.introduction: fitzbillies restaurant serves a variety of bistro style lunches, anglo-european a la carte evening meals, as well as teas coffees and cakes throughout the day. catering for private parties is available upon request

restaurants_all.name: cotto
restaurants_all.introduction: cotto is a restaurant cafe and bakery all rolled in to one. The restaurant upstairs is open for dinner from wednesday to saturday consisting of one menu of between three to five dishes tailored to the day the cafe and bakery offer cakes and other delicacies

restaurants_all.name: the cambridge chop house
restaurants_all.signature: lamb barnsley chop potato and garlic bake greens and gravy

restaurants_all.name: midsummer house restaurant
restaurants_all.signature: seared scallops with truffle apple and celeriac

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I need an expensive hotel in the central area. Can you suggest one?
I'd suggest University Arms Hotel, which is a 4-star hotel with excellent ratings at Regent Street. Would you like to know more?
Perfect! I want to reserve it for 2 guests. A double room for six nights beginning tomorrow.
Your reservation is confirmed! Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Could you also suggest Indian places to eat in the central area?
What about Mahal Of Cambridge? It's a cheap Indian spot at 3 - 5 Millers Yard Mill Lane. Want to hear more about it?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

restaurants_all.name: curry garden
restaurants_all.introduction: curry garden serves traditional indian and bangladeshi cuisine cooked with fresh produce delivered every day

restaurants_all.name: kohinoor
restaurants_all.introduction: kohinoor serves a variety of indian and vegetarian dishes at their restaurant a takeaway and delivery service is also available

restaurants_all.name: the golden curry
restaurants_all.introduction: the golden curry serves a variety of authentic indian dishes at their fully licensed restaurant

restaurants_all.name: the gandhi
restaurants_all.introduction: the gandhi serves a variety of indian and bangladeshi dishes at their restaurant to eat in or take away. Catering for private parties of up to 140 guests is available upon request

restaurants_all.name: saffron brasserie
restaurants_all.introduction: the saffron brasserie serve a variety of dishes from their contemporary indian and bangladeshi menu. Catering for private parties of up to 100 guests is available upon request

restaurants_all.name: mahal of cambridge
restaurants_all.signature: chicken tikka masala

restaurants_all.name: curry king
restaurants_all.address: 5 Jordans Yard Bridge Street City Centre
restaurants_all.introduction: curry king serve a variety of indian dishes to eat in or take away catering for private parties of up to 40 guests is available upon request

restaurants_all.name: curry queen
restaurants_all.introduction: curry queen is the most popular indian restaurant in cambridge serving good indian cuisine including all the usual dishes

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I need a moderately priced hotel in the north district. Can you help me out?
Sure! Acorn Guest House is a 4-star guesthouse with awesome reviews at 154 Chesterton Road. Want to hear more details?
That sounds great! I want to reserve a double room for 2 guests, four nights from tomorrow.
Perfect! Your booking is confirmed. Need help with anything else?
I'm also after British places to dine in the central district. Got any ideas?
Absolutely! Cotto is a moderately priced British restaurant you'll find at 183 East Road City Centre. Want additional details?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

restaurant.name: cotto
restaurant.introduction: cotto is a restaurant cafe and bakery all rolled in to one. The restaurant upstairs is open for dinner from wednesday to saturday consisting of one menu of between three to five dishes tailored to the day the cafe and bakery offer cakes and other delicacies

restaurants_all.name: restaurant one seven
restaurants_all.address: De Vere University Arms Regent Street City Centre
restaurants_all.introduction: adjoining the de vere university arms restaurant one seven is located at the forefront of regent street, and provides a birds eye view to take in the hustle and bustle of the busy city. Enjoy beautifully created food which is always complemented by a fine selection of wines in a truly relaxing and contemporary atmosphere

restaurants_all.name: the oak bistro
restaurants_all.signature: chargrilled rib eye steak with truffle butter mixed salad and fries

restaurants_all.name: the copper kettle
restaurants_all.introduction: the copper kettle serve a variety of english dishes at their restaurant including full english breakfasts lunches, roast dinners and baked potatoes. a takeaway menu is also provided

restaurants_all.name: fitzbillies restaurant
restaurants_all.introduction: fitzbillies restaurant serves a variety of bistro style lunches, anglo-european a la carte evening meals, as well as teas coffees and cakes throughout the day. catering for private parties is available upon request

restaurants_all.name: cotto
restaurants_all.introduction: cotto is a restaurant cafe and bakery all rolled in to one. The restaurant upstairs is open for dinner from wednesday to saturday consisting of one menu of between three to five dishes tailored to the day the cafe and bakery offer cakes and other delicacies

restaurants_all.name: the cambridge chop house
restaurants_all.signature: lamb barnsley chop potato and garlic bake greens and gravy

restaurants_all.name: midsummer house restaurant
restaurants_all.signature: seared scallops with truffle apple and celeriac

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I'm trying to find a cheap hotel in the west side of town. Got any recommendations?
You might like The Cambridge Belfry, a 4-star hotel with strong reviews at Back Lane, Cambourne. Want additional info?
Awesome, I want to reserve it for two guests. A double room for five nights beginning tomorrow.
You're all booked! Is there something else I can assist with?
I'd also like a recommendation for Italian restaurants in the central side of town.
Try Ask Restaurant! It's a cheap Italian restaurant at 12 Bridge Street City Centre. Curious to know more?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

restaurant.name: ask restaurant
restaurant.introduction: ask is a leading name in the uk casual dining market with over 100 restaurants across the uk. ask is the perfect place to relax and enjoy mouthwatering risottos an extended range of hearty al forno dishes and all your favourite pastas pizzas and salads

I need a moderately priced hotel in the north district. Can you help me out?
Sure! Hamilton Lodge is a 3-star guesthouse with awesome reviews at 156 Chesterton Road. Want to hear more details?
That sounds great! I want to reserve a double room for 2 guests, six nights from tomorrow.
Perfect! Your booking is confirmed. Need help with anything else?
I'm also after Thai places to dine in the central district. Got any ideas?
Absolutely! Bangkok City is an expensive Thai restaurant you'll find at 24 Green Street City Centre. Want additional details?

messages.content: Hi, how can I help you today?
I need a moderately priced hotel in the north area. Can you suggest one?
I'd suggest Lovell Lodge, which is a 2-star hotel with excellent ratings at 365 Milton Road. Would you like to know more?
Perfect! I want to reserve it for 2 guests. A double room for six nights beginning tomorrow.
Your reservation is confirmed! Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Could you also suggest British places to eat in the central area?
What about Midsummer House Restaurant? It's an expensive British spot at Midsummer Common. Want to hear more about it?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

restaurant.name: midsummer house restaurant
restaurant.signature: seared scallops with truffle apple and celeriac

restaurants_all.name: restaurant one seven
restaurants_all.address: De Vere University Arms Regent Street City Centre
restaurants_all.introduction: adjoining the de vere university arms restaurant one seven is located at the forefront of regent street, and provides a birds eye view to take in the hustle and bustle of the busy city. Enjoy beautifully created food which is always complemented by a fine selection of wines in a truly relaxing and contemporary atmosphere

restaurants_all.name: the oak bistro
restaurants_all.signature: chargrilled rib eye steak with truffle butter mixed salad and fries

restaurants_all.name: the copper kettle
restaurants_all.introduction: the copper kettle serve a variety of english dishes at their restaurant including full english breakfasts lunches, roast dinners and baked potatoes. a takeaway menu is also provided

restaurants_all.name: fitzbillies restaurant
restaurants_all.introduction: fitzbillies restaurant serves a variety of bistro style lunches, anglo-european a la carte evening meals, as well as teas coffees and cakes throughout the day. catering for private parties is available upon request

restaurants_all.name: cotto
restaurants_all.introduction: cotto is a restaurant cafe and bakery all rolled in to one. The restaurant upstairs is open for dinner from wednesday to saturday consisting of one menu of between three to five dishes tailored to the day the cafe and bakery offer cakes and other delicacies

I need a moderately priced hotel in the north area. Can you suggest one?
I'd suggest Acorn Guest House, which is a 4-star guesthouse with excellent ratings at 154 Chesterton Road. Would you like to know more?
Perfect! I want to reserve it for 2 guests. A double room for three nights beginning tomorrow.
Your reservation is confirmed! Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Could you also suggest Modern European places to eat in the central area?
What about The River Bar Steakhouse And Grill? It's a cheap Modern European spot at Quayside Off Bridge Street. Want to hear more about it?
How far is it from the hotel to the restaurant?

restaurant.name: the river bar steakhouse and grill

restaurants_all.name: de luca cucina and bar
restaurants_all.introduction: de luca cucina bar in the heart of cambridge is a stylish spot to enjoy food, wine, cocktails and coffee all in a vibrant atmosphere. The cocktail bar at the front is perfect for coffee and light meals in the day and cocktails in the evening. An open kitchen provides real excitement with head chef darren kiegher and his team preparing simply delicious italian food using locally sourced ingredients.
